template_intent.purpose: Hyperparameter search over Ray Train - Practical guide to integrating Tune with Train workloads, with result tracking and cost-awareness. Natural progression from single training run to hyperparameter optimization.
modules: Ray Tune (search spaces, Tuner API, search algorithms, schedulers)
Ray Train (TorchTrainer, ScalingConfig, distributed training basics)
template_intent.source_relationship: Follow closely - Use Tune/Train docs structure as foundation, enriched with hands-on integration examples and production patterns.
target_outcomes: Set up hyperparameter search - Define search spaces and configure Tune for Ray Train workloads
Integrate Tune with Ray Train - Pass Train trainers to Tune, handle distributed resources correctly
Track and compare results - Use ResultGrid to find best configurations and analyze trials
Optimize for cost - Use schedulers to stop poor trials early and reduce compute spend

compute_requirements.rationale: Single GPU (L4 or A10G) per trial for realistic distributed training examples. Shows proper resource allocation for hyperparameter search.

dependencies.rationale: LLM tier includes torch, transformers pre-installed. Only need tensorboard for logging visualization.

debug_notes.verification_method: Inline code execution on Anyscale workspace
verified_concepts: Section 3: Tunable function with config dict - tune.report({'metric': value}) verified
Section 4: Search space definitions (tune.uniform, tune.loguniform, tune.choice)
Section 5: Hyperparameter search execution with tune.run()
Section 6: Result analysis with get_best_trial() and ResultGrid
Section 7: ASHA scheduler configuration and early stopping
Resource allocation patterns for Tune trials
debug_notes.key_api_finding: In Ray 2.55, tune.report() requires dict argument: tune.report({'score': value}), NOT tune.report(score=value). This is different from train.report() which accepts both. All template code uses correct dict syntax.
debug_notes.note: Core Ray Tune+Train integration patterns verified on Anyscale workspace with Ray 2.55.1. All API patterns from template sections 3-7 confirmed working. Full GPU training example not executed, but integration patterns and cost optimization strategies validated.

embedded_images.title: Ray Tune Hyperparameter Search Workflow
embedded_images.description: End-to-end workflow showing search space definition, Tuner configuration, trial execution, and result analysis

embedded_images.title: ASHA Scheduler: Early Stopping for Cost Savings
embedded_images.description: Visual comparison of trials with and without ASHA early stopping, demonstrating 30% cost reduction

embedded_images.title: Concurrent Trial Resource Allocation
